F32 Words in rule 31.11(4) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 18(12)(b) (with reg. 26 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(e) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


### Effect of registration under rule 31.11 E+W


31.12. Registration of a judgment under rule 31.11 will serve for the purpose of F33 ... Article 24 of the 1996 Hague Convention [ F34 , ] F35 ... as a decision that the judgment is recognised.


Textual Amendments


F33 Words in rule 31.12 omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 18(13)(a) (with reg. 26 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(e) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


F34 Rule 31.12: comma substituted for word (13.3.2014) by virtue of The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/524) , rules 1 , 10(a)

metadata.title: Part 31 — Registration of Orders under the Council Regulation, the Civil Partnership (Jurisdiction and Recognition of Judgments) Regulations 2005 and under the Hague Convention 1996
